NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DECLARATION OF TIMAN D. TRUONG RE: THIRD PARTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRUONG, TINA D.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2019 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-25-2019 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT CREDITOR TINA D. TRUONG IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR GAVNEY5, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY REBECCA MARTIN, OFFICE MANAGER. SHERIFF'S PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT FILED WITH THE COURT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO HEARING. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT NEXT HEARING IF COMPLETE PAYMENT IS NOT MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE AT NEXT ORDER OF EXAMINATION HEARING THE MATTER IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-06-2018 BY PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. 506 PLAINTIFF TINA D. TRUONG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER LINH MUSFELT #300210. DEFENDANT GAVNEY5, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JIM GAVNEY, CEO. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

DBA EMERALD AUTO REPAIR $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $815.00, PLAINTIFF SHALL PICK UP HER VEHICLE FROM THE DEFENDANT WITHIN 15 DAYS FROM THE SERVICE DATE OF THIS ORDER. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-25-2019 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-11-2019 Continued To Feb-25-19 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-24-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Tina D. Truong, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Jim Gavney, appears in Propria Persona as CEO and representative for Appellant/Defendant Gavney5, Inc. DBA Emerald Auto Repair.

This cause comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo this day.
Parties are placed under oath.
Appellant and Respondent testifies on their own behalf, and responds to the questions from the Court.
Documentary evidence is introduced, and returned to the parties in open court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission.

Dept. 525. Judge Pro Tem Robert (Bob) Aune; Clerk S. Ravinantapricha; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-07-2018 Judgment Entered
